title: Agency Commercial Mortgage-Backed Securities - Federal Reserve Bank of New York

source.name: Federal Reserve Bank of New York

summary: The summary is factually accurate and well-supported by source text. No corrections needed.
key_points: FOMC directed agency CMBS purchases effective March 23, 2020 through November 4, 2021
Purchases targeted multifamily mortgages guaranteed by Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac, and Ginnie Mae
BlackRock Financial Markets Advisory was retained as investment manager on March 24, 2020
Transaction data published quarterly, approximately two years after conduct per Dodd-Frank Act
Historical price data available for March 2020-March 2021 period
